index.description: Turn validated intent into a buildable spec. Output is something a developer / designer / agent can execute against. SDD specs, design briefs, RFCs, ADRs, system designs, capacity models, threat models, test plans.

playbook.summary: One feature (3-7 stories) ends the session with each story carrying Given/When/Then ACs, edge cases, and explicit non-goals, ready for dev pickup.
"Capture one architectural decision in a way the client's architecture review board accepts, AI agent can replay, and the next dev finds 18 months later. Used 1-3 times per sprint."

"From kickoff to signed-off baseline requirements doc, with AI accelerating every step and a BA retaining accountability. Output: stakeholder map, interview-transcript-derived requirements, ambiguit..."
Run any AI-generated batch of user stories through a structured truth check before they touch the backlog. One batch in, validated subset out.
Architect identifies a decision, runs a CLI flow that drafts an ADR from codebase context, validates each Consequence claim against the repo, and produces an ADR ready for team vote.
One business flow (e.g. claim approval, onboarding) ends the session as a reviewable BPMN 2.0 diagram with swimlanes, decision points, and a 1-page narrative.
PM receives a vague top-level OKR (e.g.

Build a defensible capacity + cost projection ahead of a launch / migration / scale event. Done = capacity model with 3 traffic scenarios, cost model tied to cloud price sheet, recommended rightsiz...
Architect produces a per-component cost-per-1M-requests and p95 latency budget that gates the design review.
A team has a service ready to ship; output is a documented SLI/SLO sheet, error-budget policy, burn-rate alert rules wired into Prometheus/Grafana, and a runbook link per alert.
"Engineering can implement without re-asking; spec covers states, tokens, motion, a11y, edge cases, and Figma <-> code mapping."

From RPO/RTO targets to a tested DR plan. Done = published runbooks, a live drill against a non-prod environment with measured restore time, gap fixes scheduled, and an updated DR ADR signed by ops...
"One feature spec written end-to-end: problem, users, success metric, scope, out-of-scope, open questions; ready for engineering and design review."

Domain-specific playbook for a BA on a KYC / AML feature in a regulated FinTech context. Anchors every requirement to a specific regulation clause; produces compliance-grade traceability for audit....

"Fixed-price bid discovery + estimation (1 week) — Daria leads pre-sales discovery for a fixed-price proposal. By end of week 1 she has: a discovery report, a sized estimate with assumptions + risk ..."

Brand-new engagement with a US/EU/UK/AU client → signed SoW, ratified architecture, RACI + cadence, dev env on client stack, first sprint groomed, and an inception report a senior promotion panel w...

"From blank slate to a reviewed, signed-off architecture pack: context + container diagrams, ADR set, quality-attribute scenarios, cost model, risk register. Stakeholders (product + eng leads + secu..."

"From feature-freeze to multi-channel launch: positioning, target ICP segments, launch assets, channel mix, success metrics, and post-launch iteration loop. 'Done' = feature is live, all assigned ch..."
"30-90 min working session → turns vague 'we need this feature' into a ticket with INVEST user story, AC, dependencies, story-points placeholder, compliance/security owner tagged."

"JIRA ticket scoping session with client PM — Atomic 30-90 min working session where the offshore senior turns a vague 'we need this feature' line into a ticket with INVEST user story, AC, dependenc..."
Existing or new journey map in hand; ends with a ranked list of design-debt + design-bet tickets pushed into the product backlog with traceable rationale.
"From a fuzzy topic to a vetted cluster: pillar query + 8-15 supporting queries, intent- tagged, with difficulty + SERP feature notes. Output is a brief ready to hand to a writer (or yourself)."
Raw feature request → ready-to-ship slice with validated signal + spec + flag plan + success metric.
"From request to ready-to-ship slice: signal validated, MVP cut to bone, spec written, flag plan decided, success metric defined — all before any code is generated."

"From kickoff to a signed-off requirements baseline: stakeholders mapped, business need articulated, scope boundary drawn, prioritised backlog with acceptance criteria, traceability matrix v1, gloss..."
Add or change a tool the agent can invoke → ship versioned schema + structured error contract + eval entries, no breaking change in prod.
One user flow re-prototyped after fresh feedback; updated interactive prototype ready for the next test session; rationale logged.
"Spec-ready stories → SDD feature folders with spec.md + design.md + implementation-plan.md broken into TASK_*.md files."
Test-case writing for new acceptance criteria. Convert a fresh AC list into a thin, intentional test set — happy + the 2–3 negatives that actually matter — before the feature is built.
Test data setup for tricky scenario. Build a deterministic, isolated dataset that reproduces an edge case once and forever — not a one-off SQL dump.

"Test strategy from scratch for a new product. By end of the engagement: a written test strategy document signed off by eng + product, a risk-ranked feature matrix, a defined test pyramid shape with..."
One oversized epic or feature ends the session decomposed into INVEST-sized stories with prioritisation rationale, mapped to a story-map slice.
Greenfield product taken from problem brief to validated hi-fi prototype, design tokens wired, dev handoff package shipped, first build sprint supported.
